title: AnnyTF Pack
body:
This resource pack is themed around seiso fox [Anny](https://www.twitch.tv/anny). The pack is still WIP.

Features:

- Replaces player hit sounds with Anny's.

- Villagers and pillagers retextured into Neuro and Evil Neuro.

- Pigs retextured into Anny.

- Horses retextured into Bella.

- Cows retextured into Mino.

- Sounds of these mobs have been replaced.

- Turtle sounds replaced with Vedal's.

**You will need Optifine for the pack!**
